operations.description: Set session_b_status to Session B Complete for joy registry 097
VOLUME_LIMITATION MEDIUM — G6110 agalliama has 12 STEP occurrences but 0 verse records in export

values.description: G6110 agalliama has 12 occurrences (STEP) but 0 verse records in current export. LXX-only term; relevant to NT joy vocabulary's Septuagintal roots. Phase 2 independent research required before any synthesis-level conclusions drawn from this term's absence.

operations.description: VOLUME_LIMITATION LOW — G3166 megalaucheō has 3 STEP occurrences but 0 verse records

values.description: G3166 megalaucheō, 3 occurrences (STEP), 0 verse records in export. Thin data term; boasting/braggery register, peripheral to joy analysis but flagged for completeness.

operations.description: DATA_INTEGRITY HIGH — G4862 sun (Greek preposition) present in joy term inventory, likely STEP sub-gloss contamination

values.description: G4862 is the Greek preposition sun (with), occ=278. Its presence in registry 097 is anomalous — likely STEP sub-gloss contamination from compound joy terms (e.g. sunchairō G4796). 99 verse records in export. Claude Code investigation required to determine correct disposition of these verse records.

claude_code_outstanding_actions.description: Investigate why G4862 (Greek preposition sun, occ=278) is present in registry 097 term inventory. Determine whether its 99 verse records are STEP sub-gloss contamination and how they should be handled (reassign or exclude).

Confirm whether H7442A and H7444 can be marked as schema variants of H7442B (operative ra.nan term) in wa_term_inventory. All three share 53 verse records; H7442A has 2 occurrences and H7444 has 0 occurrences.
